connection_attempt_context_t(3) Library Functions Manual connection_attempt_context_t(3)

NAME

connection_attempt_context_t - Context for connection attempts (TCP or WebSocket).

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/connection_attempt.h>

Data Fields


connection_state_t current_state
Current connection state. connection_state_t previous_state
Previous state (for debugging). uint64_t attempt_start_time_ns
When current attempt began. uint64_t timeout_ns
Timeout for connection attempt. connection_handle_t connection
Shared transport/client ownership handle. uint32_t reconnect_attempt
Reconnection attempt number (1st, 2nd, etc.). uint32_t total_transitions
Total state transitions (for metrics). bool is_reconnection
True if reconnecting after successful connection (not first connect).

Detailed Description

Context for connection attempts (TCP or WebSocket).

Manages connection state including:

  • State machine tracking (current state, previous state)
  • Timeout management
  • Transport instance (TCP or WebSocket)
  • Statistics (retry count, transitions)

Created at client startup, persists across reconnection attempts.

Definition at line 82 of file connection_attempt.h.
